style_summary:
- reel 1: 15.9s, 21 shots, cuts/sec=1.26, text=90%, SFX=61/min
- reel 2: 14.8s, 7 shots, cuts/sec=0.41, text=100%, SFX=32/min
- reel 3: 17.3s, 9 shots, cuts/sec=0.46, text=100%, SFX=62/min
- reel 4: 12.6s, 8 shots, cuts/sec=0.55, text=88%, SFX=29/min
- reel 5: 13.7s, 11 shots, cuts/sec=0.73, text=100%, SFX=57/min
- reel 6: 17.3s, 9 shots, cuts/sec=0.46, text=100%, SFX=62/min

overlay_pattern.summary: This creator predominantly uses picture-in-picture (pip_video) overlays along with static images, placing them in strategic positions to reinforce key points in the narrative. They often employ animated pip_video for dynamic emphasis during critical moments, such as the hook and middle of the reel, while static images provide additional information or context without distracting from the main content.

entries.script_context: At the hook/open and in the middle when important concepts are introduced.
In the middle, reinforcing the brand or subject matter.
In the middle, during a discussion of funding.
